iteration_108_actions.description: Swarm iteration 108 - Fixed Chuckbot tar security vulnerability via dependency upgrades
actions_taken: ✅ Fixed Chuckbot tar security vulnerability by upgrading canvas (2.11.2→3.2.3), jsdom (24.0.0→29.1.1), node-gyp (9.4.1→13.0.0)
✅ Added npm override for tar@^7.5.16 to force secure version across all transitive dependencies
✅ Resolved 5 high-severity tar vulnerabilities (hardlink path traversal, symlink poisoning, file overwrite)
✅ All 15 open issues properly labeled, zero unlabeled
✅ CI will validate fix on next run

fixes_applied.description: Upgraded canvas, jsdom, node-gyp and added tar override to resolve GHSA-34x7-hfp2-rc4v, GHSA-8qq5-rm4j-mr97, GHSA-83g3-92jg-28cx, GHSA-qffp-2rhf-9h96, GHSA-9ppj-qmqm-q256
